{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322062029C643086BF9A41F6BAC72"}"},"total":512},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7480413005361087294","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"前期跟随洛克斯海贼船，中期大力发展国家实力，后期幕后控制世界局势。主角死亡果实能力者，不盲目的追随原著，有自己的世界线。很好看，五星！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741675311,"group_id":"7243983783324552224","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"赏恶罚善使","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N42wZxnROzqJaQvMBnwroEs=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/48df9865913d4c6b836e796c763c8bac~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709727&x-signature=q61TJP5xzo7zKCBLPIEKUEAa9c8%3D","user_id":"135995554541416","user_name":"倾溟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"135995554541416","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7243983783324552224","book_info":{"abstract":"【慢热+恶魔果实+无系统+前期发展+后期幕后】
　　面临世界政府带来的压力，为了国家，哈迪斯主动离开，去往世界政府难以触及的地方，加入洛克斯海贼团！
　　……
　　他是死亡的代名词，象征着终焉跟毁灭！
　　拥有怪物的资质跟最顶级的恶魔果实！
　　塔尔塔罗斯·哈迪斯，建立属于自己的势力，回归属于自己的王国，燃起复仇的火焰，摧毁外来的入侵势力！
　　从那残酷而血腥的时代开始至新时代，冥王哈迪斯的名号，将一直流传。
　　本书又名《抱歉雷利！抢了你的称号！》《世界政府的衰弱史》
